message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.2.1

Release highlights:
- Python 3.14 cancellation safety (CancelledError is now BaseException)
- Security hardening: thread_id validation and path traversal prevention
- Concurrency robustness: race condition fixes for project/agent creation
- NullPool for SQLite to prevent FD exhaustion on macOS

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ build-backend = "hatchling.build"
 
 [project]
 name = "mcp-agent-mail"
-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.1"
 description = "Coordinated multi-agent messaging and coordination MCP server."
 readme = "README.md"
 requires-python = ">=3.14"
